title: The 'Antique' Shift
description: Pick an object, then refer to it by an outdated name (e.g., 'pocket telegraph' for phone, 'davenport' for sofa) for the rest of the round.

title: The Unearned Expert
description: Pick a boring topic (e.g., history of cardboard) and pretend to be an obsessive enthusiast for at least 90 seconds.

title: The 'Parental' Reflex
description: Treat players like children (e.g., ask 'Did you wash your hands?' or 'Do you need a bathroom break?') then return to normal conversation.

title: The Slow Clapper
description: Start a slow, rhythmic clap after someone finishes a sentence or a drink.

title: The Sommelier of Water
description: Swirl your water glass, sniff it deeply, and describe its 'earthy notes' to whoever is nearest.

title: The Echo
description: Repeat the last three words of someone else's sentence under your breath, twice.

title: The Safety Inspector
description: Before sitting down, pick up the chair and inspect the bottom for a 'safety certification' mark.

title: The Human Statue
description: During a conversation, freeze completely still for exactly 15 seconds, then resume as if nothing happened.

title: The Corporate Pivot
description: Use at least five corporate buzzwords (e.g., 'synergy', 'touch base', 'low-hanging fruit') in a single story.

title: The Mirror
description: Subtly but clearly mimic the exact physical posture of the person you are talking to for two full minutes.

title: The Invisible Barrier
description: Act as if there is an invisible wall between two pieces of furniture, refusing to walk between them.

title: The One-Minute Delay
description: Answer a direct question exactly 60 seconds after it was asked.

title: The Thumb War
description: Attempt to initiate a thumb war with someone during a serious or quiet moment.

title: The Nickname Generator
description: Give two different people nicknames based on tropical fruits and only use those names for the round.

title: The Yoga Master
description: Incorporate one obvious yoga pose (like 'Tree Pose') into a standing conversation for 30 seconds.

title: The Sneeze Maestro
description: Sneeze three times, making each sneeze sound increasingly like a different musical note.

title: The Imaginary Buddy
description: Reference a mutual 'friend' named Bartholomew and act surprised when others say they don't know him.

title: The Sound Effect
description: Make a distinct 'whoosh' or 'boop' sound every time you sit down or stand up.

title: The Air Quotes
description: Use 'air quotes' around words that definitely don't require them (e.g., 'I'm going to the "kitchen" to get some "water"').

title: The Formal Bow
description: Give a deep, Victorian-style bow to anyone who performs a small favor for you (like passing a snack).

title: The Flavor Profile
description: Ask someone what 'color' their food or drink tastes like, then disagree with their answer.

title: The Shadow Boxer
description: After making a point in a conversation, perform three quick, silent punches into the air.

title: The Time Traveler
description: Refer to a common modern object (like a microwave or TV) as 'primitive technology' or 'a classic relic.'

title: The Background Music
description: Hum a suspenseful, movie-trailer style theme song while another player is telling a story.

title: The Hype Man
description: Introduce a player to someone they already know as if they are a world-famous celebrity.

title: The Acronym Enthusiast
description: Invent an acronym for a common object (e.g., 'Pass me the B.O.S.' for Bottle of Soda) and refuse to explain it.

title: The Ghost Hunter
description: Suddenly stop, look at a corner of the room, and ask if anyone else 'felt that cold spot.'

title: The Professional Handshaker
description: Shake someone's hand for a full 10 seconds while maintaining intense eye contact.

title: The Third Person
description: Refer to yourself in the third person for the duration of a single story or explanation.

title: The Prop Master
description: Pick up a kitchen utensil (like a whisk or spatula) and carry it with you as a 'talking stick' for 5 minutes.

title: The Weather Reporter
description: Provide a detailed 5-day weather forecast for a city that is at least 1,000 miles away.

title: The Silent Librarian
description: Shush the entire room loudly when the conversation is already at a reasonable volume.

title: The Pocket Sand
description: Pretend to throw 'invisible sand' at someone to 'distract them' while you walk away from a conversation.

title: The Fashion Police
description: Give a player a genuine, high-energy compliment on their 'brave and avant-garde' choice of socks.

title: The Slow Motion
description: Perform one entire task (like pouring a drink or putting on a jacket) in exaggerated slow motion.

title: The Fortune Teller
description: Predict a very mundane event (e.g., 'Someone will say the word "hungry" in the next 3 minutes') and celebrate if it happens.

title: The Director
description: Tell two people to 'reset the scene' and ask them to repeat their last interaction because the 'lighting was wrong.'

title: The Compliment Sandwich
description: Give someone a compliment, followed by a confusingly specific insult, followed by another compliment.

title: The Historical Footnote
description: Correct someone on a completely fabricated 'historical fact' about the house or building you are currently in.

title: The Animal Kingdom
description: Compare three different players to specific breeds of dogs and explain your reasoning in detail.

title: The Mime
description: Act as if you are stuck in an invisible box for exactly five seconds, then immediately stop and act normal.

title: The Unsolicited Advice
description: Give someone 'expert' advice on a better way to hold their phone or drink for 'maximum ergonomic efficiency.'

title: The Missing Item
description: Ask the group if anyone has seen your 'emotional support stapler' (or another non-existent weird object).

title: The Aggressive Tipper
description: Try to hand someone a coin, bill, or token as a 'tip' for a very small favor, like passing the salt.

title: The Looming Presence
description: Stand slightly too close to a player (within their personal bubble) for 10 seconds, then walk away without a word.

title: The Inconspicuous Re-aligner
description: Identify a set of objects (coasters, chairs, pens) and slowly, over 10 minutes, align them perfectly parallel to one another.
